hero.title:
Turn Your City
into an Epic
Playground
hero.description: Discover hidden secrets and share unforgettable quests with your closest friends. Your neighbourhood is the game.

generation.heading: AI Quest Generation
generation.description: AI crafts a unique quest based on your profile, city, history, and real-time location.

evidence.heading: Upload Evidence
evidence.description: Complete the objective and capture a moment of victory. Every proof adds to your legacy.

vouch.heading: Community Vouch
vouch.description: Your friends verify your feats, awarding XP and rare badges.

questGeneration.question: How are quests generated?
questGeneration.answer: Quests are generated using AI that analyzes your goals, preferences, and past activity. Each quest is uniquely tailored to push you just the right amount — challenging, but always achievable.

skipQuest.question: Can I skip a quest?
skipQuest.answer: Yes! You can skip a quest once per day without any penalty. Skipping more than once will cost you a small number of points, so choose wisely and save your skips for when you truly need them.

earnPoints.question: How do I earn points?
earnPoints.answer: Points are earned by completing quests, maintaining daily streaks, and hitting milestone goals. Bonus points are awarded for completing quests early or achieving them with extra precision.

cta.title: Ready to Level Up?
cta.description: Join thousands of friends already transforming their daily routines.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: Fill in your details to get started

validation.passwordMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.usernameMin3: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.descriptionMax200: Description must be 200 characters or less
validation.titleMin3: Title must be at least 3 characters
validation.descriptionMin10: Description must be at least 10 characters

create.title: Create a Friend Group
create.subtitle: Fill out the details to start a new group
create.descriptionPlaceholder: A short description of your friend group...

formCircle.title: Gather Your Crew
formCircle.description: Heroes don’t go it alone. Invite up to 6 friends and create your private guild.

dailyChoice.title: The Daily Choice
dailyChoice.description: Every day, our AI Overseer picks one member from your crew for a unique, personalized quest.

proofOfValor.title: Proof of Valor
proofOfValor.description: Action speaks louder than words. Upload a photo or video of your quest before midnight to prove your success.

councilVerdict.title: The Council's Verdict
councilVerdict.description: Your crew judges your efforts. They can validate your success or vote to skip a quest that doesn’t fit.

ascension.title: Level Up
ascension.description: Earn XP, level up, and unlock bigger quests with higher stakes and greater rewards.

guide.description: QuestBound is a gamified adventure for you and your friends. Take on daily quests and level up your real-life experience.
